$schema-comment: Consumer registry — repos initialized from this boilerplate. Used by scripts/check-drift.mjs and (eventually) a propagate-changes skill to walk repos consistently when syncing upstream changes. `path` is relative to this file. `stack` tags gate which sourced artifacts apply (e.g. `no-react` repos skip the React-performance bundle). `instructions_format` records the layout of each repo's `.ai/instructions.md` skills index so edits target the right shape. `skip` is a list of path prefixes (relative to `.ai/`) that the consumer intentionally does NOT carry — drift-check ignores them.

consumers.name: autodoc-ui
consumers.notes: UI lib, not a feature app. Has its own skills (component-example-workflow, css-slot-pattern). No app-level i18n, no feature workflow.

consumers.name: mf-platform-utility-module
consumers.notes: Utility module — no React, no i18n, no feature workflow.

consumers.name: mf-root-config
consumers.notes: single-spa root config — no React, no i18n, no feature workflow.

consumers.name: mf-workforce
consumers.notes: Has local replacements: own translations/ skill, own forked import-order. Owns these — do not propagate.
